hero.headline: Making Chemistry Clear, Practical, and Accessible
hero.description: I'm Sara Taher — Chemistry educator, science content creator, and your guide to understanding the building blocks of our world. From atomic structure to organic chemistry, I make the complex beautifully simple.

about.title: Passionate About Making Chemistry Click
about.body: With over 5 years of experience teaching IGCSE Chemistry, I've developed a teaching method that breaks down complex concepts into intuitive, memorable frameworks. My students consistently achieve top grades — but more importantly, they develop a genuine love for science.

topics.title: Chemistry Made Accessible
topics.subtitle: Comprehensive coverage of every IGCSE Chemistry topic, explained with clarity and supported by rich visual materials.

about.title: Chemistry Educator, Science Communicator, Lifelong Learner
about.subtitle: My journey from curious student to trusted educator — and why I believe every learner can excel in chemistry.

bio.title: My Story
bio.p1: My journey is fueled by a deep-seated passion for research and continuous learning. Throughout my academic years, my love for scientific exploration drove me to excel and stand out, shaping the dedicated educator and researcher I am today.
bio.p2: After completing my degree in Chemistry and earning my teaching qualifications, I began teaching IGCSE Chemistry and quickly developed a reputation for making difficult concepts genuinely accessible. My approach combines visual learning, real-world connections, and a structured exam technique that gives students both confidence and competence.
bio.p3: Today, I work with students across the globe through online tutoring, create educational content for social media and this platform, and develop curriculum resources used by schools and independent learners worldwide.

philosophy.title: My Teaching Philosophy
philosophy.p1: Chemistry is not a collection of facts to memorize — it's a way of thinking about matter, energy, and transformation. My goal is never just to help students pass exams, though they do. My goal is to give them a framework for understanding how the physical world works.
principles: Clarity before complexity — foundations before details
Real-world context makes abstract concepts stick
Exam technique is a skill, and it can be taught
Every student has a different learning style — teaching adapts

mission.title: My Mission
mission.body: To make rigorous chemistry education accessible to every learner, regardless of background or location — through clear teaching, quality resources, and a belief that science belongs to everyone.
